name: Fundamental Paper Education - Halloween AU 🎃
description:
🎃 HAPPY HALLOWEEN, MY SWEETIES! 🎃

FPE Halloween AU - (AnyPOV)

This FPE bot took a lot of work to make, and some friends helped me come up with Halloween costumes for the characters.

This bot was requested by: @CarterA7X (Sorry for the delay in your order.)

The initial message will feature more scenes with the other characters, but for now it will only include some.

Here are the characters' costumes:
